/usr/bin/clang++ -fPIC --coverage -O3 -g -pedantic -Wall -Wextra -fPIC -march=native -O3 -g -pedantic -fPIC -D __FILENAME__='"$$(subst  /home/igor/Documentos/[08] Projetos/[16]_DW_Decomp/,,$$(abspath $$<))"' -g -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/DwDecomp.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libDwDecompd.so -o libDwDecompd.so CMakeFiles/DwDecomp.dir/src/DW_Decomp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DwDecomp.dir/src/BranchAndPrice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DwDecomp.dir/src/SearchStrategy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DwDecomp.dir/src/PrimalHeuristic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DwDecomp.dir/src/Branch.cpp.o   -L/home/igor/gurobi1200/linux64/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/igor/gurobi1200/linux64/lib: -lgurobi_c++ -lgurobi
